key_dungeons.name: Burning Sanctum
key_dungeons.description: A narrow crevice leads into Burning Sanctum. The sound of dripping water echoes endlessly below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Burning Sanctum for the hidden Silver Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

game_log: Doctor tinkers a Dagger! (d20:10+3=13 vs DC8)

Rat Infestation: Hey therre, you look like a tough bunch. Tough enough to help with a little domestic problem. I am the owner of the General Shop, but I have a problem. You see, a while back I let a Goblin stay in my basement in exchange for... well, let's not get into that. But, since then he has let the place fall apart. Now it's full of Giant Rats and some of this vile kin. Can you deal with this? I promise, I can contribute to your adventures.
Rat Infestation: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Rat Infestation': Kill the Rats - Complete!
Quest 'Rat Infestation': Kill the Rats, Part II - Complete!
Quest 'Rat Infestation': Remove the Goblin - Complete! | All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Rat Infestation: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold, +2 items (Camping Supplies, Arrows)
The party rests using Camping Supplies...
Restored 10 HP and 11 MP across the party!
Doctor's tinkering fails... scraps everywhere! (d20:4+3=7 vs DC8)
The party rests using Camping Supplies...
Restored 0 HP and 6 MP across the party!
Lardo the Bardo: The Goblin Horde is threatening our town from their stronghold up North. If you take care of this for us, I will make it worth your while.
Lardo the Bardo: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
You descend into Goblin Stronghold - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 30 gold.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 18 gold and Leather.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 30 gold and Healing Herb.
